questions.question: Which language is used to interact with databases?
Which key uniquely identifies a record in a table?
Which normal form removes partial dependency?
How does a computer represent an image?
options: As a collection of pixels and numerical values
questions.answer: As a collection of pixels and numerical values

questions.question: Imagine you are building a CNN-powered application for your school.  What problem would it solve, and how would it use images to make decisions?  Ans in 2–3 sentences.
Why are Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) preferred over regular Neural Networks for image-related tasks?
options: CNNs can automatically learn visual features from images
CNNs only work with black-and-white images
questions.answer: CNNs can automatically learn visual features from images

questions.question: What is the main purpose of a convolution operation in a CNN?
options: To detect important features such as edges, shapes, and patterns in an image
questions.answer: To detect important features such as edges, shapes, and patterns in an image

questions.question: Which of the following are real-world applications of CNNs?
questions.answer: Face Recognition in smartphones, Medical Image Analysis, Self-Driving Cars

questions.question: Modern AI systems such as ChatGPT contain billions of parameters and many neural network layers.  Why do you think Deep Neural Networks are better at solving complex problems than a single Perceptron?
Which of the following are commonly used Activation Functions?
Why are Activation Functions important in Neural Networks?
options: They help the network decide whether information should move forward
questions.answer: They help the network decide whether information should move forward

questions.question: What is a Perceptron?
options: The simplest building block of a neural network
questions.answer: The simplest building block of a neural network

questions.question: A perceptron receives multiple inputs and then decides whether to activate or not. This process is most similar to:
options: Making a decision based on available information
questions.answer: Making a decision based on available information
